name: Lima Bean-Filled Potasto Snacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Combine all ingredients except the yogurt and new potatoes in a non-stick skillet.
3. Cook over medium heat until onions are tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Pour into a food processor or blender and add yogurt.
5. Process until smooth.
6. Cut a thin slice off of the bottom of each potato so it will not roll.
7. Scoop out a small amount of potato and fill cavity with the lima bean mixture.
8. Heat the stuffed potatoes for 10-15 minutes before serving.
One serving of 4 potatoes: 87 calories, 5g protein, 32g carbohydrates, 2g fat, 72mg sodium; exchanges: 2 starch/bread
